description_long: This object is a vintage mechanical typewriter, featuring a rectangular base with a slightly sloped front panel housing round, raised keys arranged in a classic typewriter layout. The upper section includes two large, circular spools for the ink ribbon and a cylindrical platen roller for feeding paper, both supported by robust side arms. The keys are dark and metallic, with a glossy finish, and the typebars are visible beneath a curved metal grille. The body is primarily constructed from dark metal, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance, with subtle metallic highlights and a faintly visible brand marking on the front right. The overall design is compact yet substantial, with a flat bottom and a slightly elevated rear section to accommodate the paper feed mechanism.
description: A vintage mechanical typewriter with round, raised keys and a robust dark metal body, featuring prominent ribbon spools and a cylindrical platen roller. The design is compact, industrial, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard layout, curved grille, and brand marking on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side profile, ribbon spool, and the depth of the platen roller.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cylindrical platen roller and the back of the typewriter's frame.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right ribbon spool, side arm, and the mechanical structure supporting the roller.
